_meta.stability: Frozen for the loom-generation lifetime per ADR-002.
_meta.relation_to_classic: Classic GET /api/ready returns a bare list of IssueDicts. Loom wraps in ListResponse[IssueLoom] with has_more always false (the underlying get_ready() is unbounded today).

shape_decl.rationale: get_ready() returns the full ready set in memory, so has_more is always false and next_offset is always omitted.

examples.name: empty_or_seeded
examples.note: Empty project (or one with auto-seeded planning issues) returns the unified envelope. Items shape is asserted by seeded shape-pin tests, not the fixture.
